title: Ecuador squad named | Ecuador | FIFA World Cup 2026
original_text:
Willian Pacho, Moises Caicedo and Enner Valencia all included in Sebastian Beccacece's Ecuador squad for the FIFA World Cup 2026.
Sebastian Beccacece has announced his Ecuador squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup™. The South American team was eliminated at the group stage in Qatar 2022, and will be competing for a place in the knockout rounds with Côte d'Ivoire, Curaçao and Germany in Group E.
Ecuador have only lost once since Argentine coach Beccacece took charge in 2024, a defeat that came in his first game in charge.
Ecuador's World Cup squadEcuador's World Cup squad
GoalkeepersGoalkeepers
Hernan Galindez Gonzalo Valle Moises Ramirez
DefendersDefenders
Piero Hincapie Willian Pacho Pervis Estupinan Angelo Preciado Joel Ordonez Felix Torres Jackson Porozo Yaimar Medina
MidfieldersMidfielders
Moises Caicedo Alan Franco Gonzalo Plata Kendry Paez Pedro Vite Jordy Alcivar Denil Castillo John Yeboah Nilson Angulo Alan Minda
Forwards
Enner Valencia Kevin Rodriguez Jordy Caicedo Anthony Valencia Jeremy Arevalo
All squads are provisional until the final list of 26 players is announced by FIFA, following their submission by participating teams, on 2 June.
Pacho, Caicedo and Valencia headline 26-strong listPacho, Caicedo and Valencia headline 26-strong list
Star names Willian Pacho and Moises Caicedo were both included in the selection. Centre-back Pacho has played a vital role in Paris Saint-Germain’s success over the past couple of seasons, while Caicedo has shone as the midfield engine of a Chelsea side that triumphed in the United States at the FIFA Club World Cup 2025™.
Ecuador's all-time leading scorer at the World Cup, Enner Valencia, will also be appearing at his third global finals. La Tricolor's talisman has six goals to his name from Brazil 2014 and Qatar 2022, and will once again spearhead his side's attack as they aim to match or improve upon their best result of a Round of 16 finish at Germany 2006.
Ecuador's World Cup 2026 fixtures and groupEcuador's World Cup 2026 fixtures and group
14 June: Côte d'Ivoire v Ecuador - Philadelphia Stadium
20 June: Ecuador v Curaçao - Kansas City Stadium
25 June: Ecuador v Germany - New York/New Jersey Stadium
